event.command:
# 
[ATN] Message from dev: Add a farewell subcommand to app.py: python app.py farewell Alice prints Goodbye, Alice! (priority: High)

event.text: opencode run -m deepseek/deepseek-chat "Read app.py. Add a second argparse subcommand called farewell so that python3 app.py farewell Alice prints Goodbye, Alice! Keep the existing greet command working. Update app.py in place."
python3 app.py greet World && python3 app.py farewell World
